name: sincedu-testing
description: Embeddable tester-feedback tool: element picker + screenshot + logs, Supabase-gated, Cloudflare-native (D1 + R2).

scripts.build: pnpm -C widget run build && pnpm -C app run build
scripts.type-check: pnpm -C worker run type-check && pnpm -C widget run type-check && pnpm -C app run type-check
